overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-drenched futuristic city. The player character exits an indoor corridor, traverses a wet urban plaza beneath towering skyscrapers, explores a covered street market with food vendors, and ascends an orange painted staircase to an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor transit corridor with vending machines

events.description: approaching metal exit gate leading to outdoor urban area

agents.ego_description: walking through dimly lit indoor corridor toward the exit gate

notable_agents.action: leaning against wall near the exit gate

entered.detail: green neon sign with stylized lettering mounted on wall
row of pink-lit vending machines against far wall
illuminated advertisement posters on corridor walls
retractable metal security gate at corridor exit
industrial AC units mounted on right wall

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow enclosed corridor with artificial lighting. Neon signs and vending machines line the walls as the camera moves forward toward a metal exit gate. A lone NPC leans against the wall near the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with neon billboards and wet pavement

events.description: exits indoor corridor through metal gate into open urban night environment
turns slightly right to follow the pedestrian path along the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through neon-lit urban plaza with reflective wet pavement beneath towering skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the overpass

entered.detail: elevated highway or monorail track crossing above the plaza
tall futuristic glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows
large illuminated digital advertisements on building facades
tall palm trees lining the right side of the pedestrian area

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the corridor into a wide-open urban plaza at night. Towering glass skyscrapers rise on both sides, their facades covered in neon billboards. The pavement is wet and reflective, and an overpass bridge spans the plaza ahead. Sparse pedestrians walk in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street market with food stalls and vendors

events.description: enters covered market area beneath the overpass with food stalls
slows pace to navigate between market stalls and browse vendors

agents.ego_description: walking through covered market browsing food stalls and observing vendors

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind ramen stall counter
vendor arranging items at illuminated drink stall

entered.detail: wooden food vendor stalls with illuminated menus and cooking equipment
overhead concrete structure providing shelter over the market
pink neon sign reading 'EDEN FS' above a vendor stall
bright orange painted staircase and escalator structure leading upward
orange and white construction barriers lining the market path

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a semi-covered street market beneath the overpass. Various food stalls with neon signage line the walkway, and vendors stand behind their counters. The camera moves through the market, passing a ramen stall and a drink vendor with a pink 'EDEN FS' sign. An orange staircase structure becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: orange painted staircase leading to upper street level

events.description: begins ascending the orange staircase toward upper level
emerging from covered market into brighter area at top of stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the orange painted staircase toward the upper street level

notable_agents.action: descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: tall street lamp illuminating the stairwell from above
glass and steel building facade visible at top of stairs

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera ascending the bright orange staircase that was visible in the distance. The environment becomes more enclosed as we climb, with a street lamp visible above. A pedestrian descends the stairs toward the camera. At the top, the upper street level and building facades become visible against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a cramped indoor corridor into a sprawling neon metropolis and finally up to an elevated street level. It begins within a narrow enclosed hallway lined with vending machines and neon signs, moving forward past a lone NPC toward a metal exit gate. As the camera passes through the gate, the space opens abruptly into a wide urban plaza where towering glass skyscrapers and reflective wet pavement mirror the glow of massive billboards. The scene then shifts beneath a concrete overpass into a semi-covered street market, gliding past ramen stalls and a pink EDEN FS sign before spotting a bright orange staircase ahead. Finally, the camera ascends these orange stairs, passing a descending pedestrian and moving under a street lamp until the upper street level and building facades reveal themselves against the night sky.
